demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Remove inheritance from the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
Replace the deprecated configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method with a dedicated AuthenticationProvider bean.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: public AuthenticationProvider authenticationProvider() { DaoAuthenticationProvider authProvider = new DaoAuthenticationProvider(); ... }

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Update the AuthenticationManager bean definition to retrieve it from AuthenticationConfiguration instead of super.authenticationManagerBean().
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: public AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(AuthenticationConfiguration config) throws Exception { return config.getAuthenticationManager(); }

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Replace the deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean using the new lambda DSL.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain securityFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { return http.csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable()) ... .build(); }

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Replace the deprecated authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() with authorizeHttpRequests() and requestMatchers() in the security filter chain.
Update CORS configuration syntax from the old fluent API to the new lambda-based configuration.
Update session management configuration to use the new lambda-based syntax.
Update JWT token generation to use the User entity directly instead of passing UserDetails and fullUser separately, likely adapting to a changed JwtUtil signature.

demo1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot starter parent version to 3.4.4 to align with the new Java version and framework features.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
